headline: CSX Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer to Address Bank of America Industrials, Transportation & Airlines Key Leaders Conference
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Kevin Boone, will address the Bank of America 33rd Annual Industrials, Transportation & Airlines Key Leaders Conference in New York on Wednesday, May 13, at 8:45 a.m. ET. This address will be broadcast live via webcast at investors.csx.com. A replay will be available following the conclusion of this event. This announcement, as well as additional financial informatio

headline: 'Big Short' Idol Steve Eisman Warns Iran War Could End Tomorrow, But 'The Financial Event Is Not Ending'
summary: The S&P 500 is now a leveraged bet on AI capex with semis at 17% of the index. Strategas calls for a melt-up. Steve Eisman warns on software credit.

headline: How The CSX (CSX) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Freight Signals
summary: CSX's fair value estimate has moved from US$42.10 to US$45.54, an 8.2% shift that sits alongside a broader reset of price targets across recent research. Some analysts are leaning into CSX's rail network and freight exposure to justify higher targets, while others are trimming or remaining neutral, questioning how much upside is left if volumes or execution soften. Read on to see what is driving these views and how you can follow the evolving CSX story as new data comes in. Stay updated as...

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks We Steer Clear Of
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.
